GENBLOX

PLAY TOGETHER

Small games.
One shared space.

Create a Playroom, send a code or QR to a friend, and play across devices without accounts or your own database.

×○

CURRENT ROOM

Code: -
Players: 1 / 4 Any player can launch a space for the whole room

CATALOG

Game Spaces

PlayroomKit
×○ × ○×

SPACE 001

Tic-Tac-Toe

A classic 3 x 3 match for two players.

Without a room, the game starts against the computer. Player connections live in the Rooms menu.

SPACE 002

Checkers

Russian checkers on an 8 x 8 board with mandatory captures and kings.

● ● ?

SPACE 003

Worms

A real-time duel with destructible terrain, weapons, rope, digging, blocks, and valuable supplies.

Mobile-first: rotate your phone horizontally and play with both thumbs.
!

SPACE 004

Micro Machines

Four tiny racers, slippery physics, weapons, hazards, boosts, jumps, and three laps of tabletop chaos.

Rooms support up to four human racers; bots fill the empty slots.

SPACE 005

Wave Runners

A Three.js low-poly runner about blocky heroes, trenches, color-coded danger waves, and risky trophy harvesting.

Green, yellow, and red waves get faster as your distance and trophy value climb.

SPACE 006

Fantasy Lanes

A real-time fantasy strategy duel with three lanes, fog of war, counters, towers, upgrades, and center resource springs.

Rooms support two commanders; empty enemy seats are filled by a bot.

SPACE 007

Five in a Row

A 15 x 15 connection duel: place stones and be first to make an unbroken line of five.

SPACE 008

Reversi

Trap, flip, and control the board in a compact strategy classic for two players.

6QA?

SPACE 009

Durak

A four-seat 36-card attack-and-defense table with trump, bito, take, and bots for empty seats.

Rooms support up to four human players; bots handle empty seats.

PLAYER

Profile

Avatar

GENBLOX CREATOR

Create your game

🤖 → 🎮
1 / 7Choose a game template

Follow one small step at a time. You can open this guide again whenever you need it.

1

Get a template

Choose a small game, then download its text file or copy the code.

2

Change it with AI

Attach the TXT to your AI chat and tell it your game idea.

3

Bring it back

Upload the new TXT, or paste the complete text below.

🛡️ Stay safe: never share your real name, address, school, password, or someone else's photos.

Details
Safe previewYour game cannot open your GenBlox profile or page.

Your saved versions

Up to 10 versions stay on this device.

PRIVATE ONLINE COPY

Keep it safe online

Save a private copy to your account. This does not publish it in the catalog.

Email connected

MULTIPLAYER

Rooms

Create a private room, join by code, or find an available player.

Room code and QR are available in the Playroom lobby before launch.
